findings.finding: Missing capability: Athena TRACKED_FIELDS change detection uses empty-check instead of deep-equality, causing verification command rewrites (prose→executable) to be invisible in legacyCorrections
findings.remediation: Replace empty-check with deep-equality comparison in athena_reviewer.ts TRACKED_FIELDS loop so all meaningful changes are captured in corrections metadata

findings.finding: Missing capability: Lane diversity gate fires after wave dispatch, allowing monocultural worker execution before enforcement
findings.remediation: Move lane_diversity_gate check to pre-wave-1 validation phase (before first dispatch) and set dispatchBlockReason if minimum threshold not met

findings.finding: Missing capability: Prometheus submits plans without validating that executionStrategy.waves role coverage matches plans[] array, causing role mismatches to reach Athena
findings.remediation: Add post-LLM structural assertion in prometheus.ts: extract roles from waves[] tasks, verify each has matching plans[] entry with correct role field, reject and re-prompt if mismatch detected

resolvedLineage.finding: Self-improvement flagged 3 critical lesson(s): CI on main has been broken for at least 3 consecutive commits (0ec5b75, f276e7a, 531bbc0) with no CI-fix worker successfully completing a fix. Every cycle that closes without merging a CI fix compounds debt. quality-worker and evolution-worker must be explicitly tasked with CI repair as wave 1 prior
resolvedLineage.remediation: Address critical lessons in next cycle planning
resolvedLineage._resolutionNote: retired because fresh main-branch CI state supersedes historical system-learning CI debt

recentTraces.context: gateSource=pre_dispatch_gate reason=lane_diversity_insufficient:Only 1 effective lane(s) active, minimum is 2; nominal lanes=1. Worker topology may be monoc
